# Changelog

All notable changes to the `@zakelfassi/skdd` CLI are recorded here. The format follows
[Keep a Changelog 1.1.0](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/); this project adheres to
[Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

[release-please](https://github.com/googleapis/release-please) manages this file from v1.0.0
onwards. Entries below are hand-curated from the root `CHANGELOG.md` for historical context.

<!-- Release notes for 1.0.0 and later are generated by release-please. -->

## [1.0.0](https://github.com/zakelfassi/skills-driven-development/compare/v0.3.0...v1.0.0) (2026-06-14)


### ⚠ BREAKING CHANGES

* **cli:** skdd sync (stub) removed; it never performed any sync. The command always exited 2 with a 'not yet implemented' warning. If you scripted skdd sync, delete the call. Federated colony sync remains on the roadmap; see colony/discovery.md Option 3.

### Added

* **cli:** add Factory Droid harness profile and detection markers ([74bfff0](https://github.com/zakelfassi/skills-driven-development/commit/74bfff0421fece526da4fa83921833bd9c55d9e0))
* **cli:** canonical mcp.json schema, env expansion, and managed-server state ([21bc966](https://github.com/zakelfassi/skills-driven-development/commit/21bc966fe19602c363977cb1f2fb48d776d47d0d))

* **cli:** skdd show &lt;name&gt; + docs disambiguation (forge CLI vs skillforge meta-skill) ([f912a2b](https://github.com/zakelfassi/skills-driven-development/commit/f912a2b699fd3edd6ab9d1ae64a702cdebf3faf8))

* SkDD 1.0.0 — global colony, MCP sync, hub TUI, release automation ([#1](https://github.com/zakelfassi/skills-driven-development/issues/1)) ([f9810a4](https://github.com/zakelfassi/skills-driven-development/commit/f9810a4f10862af1963a9b4b472c499afac69597))

* **cli:** remove the skdd sync stub command ([93c3e09](https://github.com/zakelfassi/skills-driven-development/commit/93c3e095085cab1a6522836728881fd0c40d0fdb))

## [0.3.0] — 2026-04-13

### Added
- **`skdd doctor`** — health check over `.colony.json`, canonical `skills/`, registry drift, mirror
  state, and instruction blocks. `--json` output for CI consumption. 8 tests covering healthy
  colony, drift, missing mirror, malformed `.colony.json`, and instruction block presence.
- **`skdd import`** — content-hash scan across every known harness mirror path and canonical
  `skills/`. Detects duplicate groups (same content, multiple locations) and name collisions (same
  `frontmatter.name`, different content). Realpath dedup so correctly-linked projects report zero
  duplicates. `--apply` consolidates duplicates and single-source harness skills into canonical
  `skills/` and runs `skdd link --force` to re-establish mirrors. 10 tests.
- **VS Code extension scaffold** at `extensions/vscode/` — SKILL.md frontmatter snippets, command
  palette entries for SkDD commands, shells out to the `skdd` CLI. Not yet published.
- **`docs/schemastore-submission.md`** — draft PR body for SchemaStore submission.
- Visual identity: `assets/logo.svg` and `assets/wordmark.svg`. README hero, badges.
- Mermaid diagrams replacing ASCII art in README and docs.
- `docs/why-skdd.md` — narrative pitch doc.
- Starlight docs site scaffold under `site/`.
- `.github/workflows/deploy-docs.yml` — GitHub Pages deploy.

### Changed
- `package.json` version bumped `0.2.0` → `0.3.0`; description updated.
- `cli/README.md` expanded with full per-command reference.
- `src/index.ts` registers `doctor` and `import` subcommands; `--version` reports `0.3.0`.

## [0.2.0] — 2026-04-12

### Added
- **Canonical `skills/` + harness mirror pattern.** All supported harnesses now have a
  `.<harness>/skills` mirror pointing at a canonical `skills/` directory. On Unix the mirror is a
  symlink; on Windows it is a file copy tracked in `.skdd-sync.json`.
- **`skdd link`** — idempotent sync that creates/repairs mirrors. `--mode`, `--harness`, `--force`,
  `--quiet` flags. Backed by `cli/src/lib/fs-link.ts` and `cli/src/lib/sync-state.ts`.
- **`detectAllHarnesses()`** in `cli/src/lib/harness.ts`.
- **`renderCanonicalInstructionBlock()`** template for `CLAUDE.md` / `AGENTS.md` / rules files.
- Docs updates: `docs/skill-colony.md` glossary, `docs/configuration.md` rewrite, all 11
  `docs/integrations/*.md` updated to canonical pattern. `CONTRIBUTING.md` ground rule added.
- Schema updates: `.colony.json` adds `canonicalSkillsDir` and `harnessMirrors`. `colony-v1.json`
  updated.

### Changed
- `skdd init` defaults to canonical mode — creates `skills/skillforge/`, the registry, the
  instruction block, and calls `skdd link` for the detected harness.
- `skdd forge` writes to `skills/<name>/` by default, then calls `skdd link` to refresh mirrors.

### Fixed
- Symlink deletion on macOS: `cli/src/lib/fs-link.ts` uses `unlinkSync` (not `rmSync`) when
  removing a symlink to a directory.

## [0.1.0] — 2026-04-11

### Added
- Initial `skdd` CLI with `init`, `validate`, `forge`, `list`, `sync` (stub) subcommands.
- Agent Skills spec validator (`cli/src/lib/spec.ts` + `cli/src/commands/validate.ts`).
- Registry format: `.skills-registry.md` + optional `.skills-registry.json`. Parser/writer in
  `cli/src/lib/registry.ts`.
- Harness detection + instruction block templates in `cli/src/lib/harness.ts` +
  `cli/src/lib/templates.ts`.
- CI workflows: `validate-skills.yml` (spec validation + link check + stale-rename grep) and
  `publish-skills.yml` (placeholder for future npm publish).
- Methodology docs: `docs/skill-colony.md`, `docs/forging-skills.md`, `docs/configuration.md`,
  `docs/specification-alignment.md`, vendored spec snapshot, 11 harness integration docs.
- Claude Code plugin scaffold at `plugins/skdd-claude/`.
- `.colony.json` manifest + `docs/spec/colony-v1.json` JSON Schema.
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `LICENSE` (MIT), example project under `examples/webapp-starter/`.
